project_area: Cultural landmark establishment and art/culture promotion
demographic_requirements: Support for Middle Eastern and North African artists (emerging and established)
eligibility_summary: The Kamel Lazaar Foundation will occupy and transform 93 Mortimer Street into a cultural landmark, focusing on contemporary art and culture in the Arab world and beyond. The initiative is part of The Langham Estate's investment program and aims to foster cross-border cultural dialogue, host events, and support artists through residencies and partnerships.
